request_payload.actionable_question: Who are the top 10 students most in need of intervention right now?

confidence.reason: 1998 students × 9 assessments across 8 weeks — strong statistical basis.

insights.title: High Risk with Multiple Flags
insights.description: The top three students, all with an at-risk score of 5, display critical flags such as low scores, low engagement, and negative trends, indicating urgent need for intervention.

insights.title: Consistent Low Performance
insights.description: Students ranked 1 to 10 consistently show low average scores, with the highest being 39.67, suggesting a systemic issue in engagement and understanding of course material.

evidence.context: Top average score among at-risk students

educational_implications: Use identifiers, risk score, and returned flags only; do not use demographic attributes or promise that review will improve outcomes.

confidence.reason: The data is derived from a comprehensive ranking based on at-risk scores and associated flags.

task_output_contract: State the ranking/top entities, rank metric value, and why they are prioritized.
For risk/admin ranking rows, include returned flags or recommended action fields when present.
Do not generalize beyond returned rows or omit the top ranked examples.
List the top ten identifiers in rank order with at_risk_score, exact triggered flags, and final outcome.
Use only the versioned internal admin-review mapping for score priority groups; do not use demographic attributes or promise outcomes.
